description_long: This is a compact hand axe featuring a robust, dark metallic blade and a solid wooden handle. The blade is wedge-shaped with a single sharp edge, and it is securely mounted onto the handle with a traditional eye fitting. The handle is made of medium-brown wood, slightly curved for ergonomic grip, and tapers towards the end for better control. The blade has a matte black finish, with a subtle transition to a sharpened, lighter edge. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the blade or the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or general-purpose use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or maintenance areas.
description: A compact hand axe with a dark metal wedge blade and a curved wooden handle, designed for practical use. The blade is matte black with a sharpened edge, and the handle is smooth, brown wood.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with the blade facing left, highlighting the wedge shape and the broad, flat side of the blade.
description_view_1: This view displays the full length of the handle and the thickness of the blade, emphasizing the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the opposite side, showing the clean, uninterrupted surface of the blade and the handle's gentle taper.
description_view_3: The blade is facing right, with the poll and the top of the handle visible, showing the secure mounting of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, oval cross-section, and ergonomic grip; tapers slightly at the end.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged wedge-shaped blade with a broad poll and a matte black finish; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged eye fitting securing the blade to the handle.
